_comment: Cinderglen — Halfling starting town in the Ebonbloom Wastes region. Safe zone, fortified burrows, druidic gardens, and steamwork sheds.
biome: fortified halfling burrows, geothermal vents, fungal gardens
description: A resilient halfling settlement built into reinforced burrows and geothermal caverns. Cinderglen stands as a bastion against creeping Void corruption, maintained by Garden Wardens and Steamweavers.

garden_wardens.description: Halfling defenders who maintain the fungal gardens and protect the burrows from corruption.

steamweavers.description: Tinkerers and engineers who maintain the geothermal vents and steamworks. Some harbor questionable sympathies toward the Moribund Order.

story_seeds: Garden Wardens seek help clearing corrupted fungal blooms.
Steamweavers request rare minerals from nearby geothermal vents.
A missing halfling child was last seen near the Void‑scarred orchard.
Rumors of a Moribund sympathizer hiding within the burrows.
A strange artifact washed up from the Ebonbloom Wastes.
